# Subscribers.Completion.finished

**Case**

The publisher finished normally.

## Declaration

```swift
case finished
```

## Completion states

- **Subscribers.Completion.failure(_:)**: The publisher stopped publishing due to the indicated error.

items.description: The publisher stopped publishing due to the indicated error.
items.name: Subscribers.Completion.failure(_:)
